'''madoto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:plaesiomyid|plaesiomyid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-d-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:plaesiomyid|plaesiomyid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| madoto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mædeteth|mædeteth]] || [[word:mædetej|mædetej]] || [[word:mædetesh|mædetesh]] || [[word:mædete|mædete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:madodototh|madodototh]] || [[word:madodotoj|madodotoj]] || [[word:madodotosh|madodotosh]] || [[word:madodoto|madodoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:madototh|madototh]] || [[word:madotoj|madotoj]] || [[word:madotosh|madotosh]] || [[word:madoto|madoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:madoftoth|madoftoth]] || [[word:madoftoj|madoftoj]] || [[word:madoftosh|madoftosh]] || [[word:madoftof|madoftof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:madototho|madototho]] || [[word:madotojo|madotojo]] || [[word:madotosho|madotosho]] || [[word:madotoko|madotoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:madototh|madototh]] || [[word:madotoj|madotoj]] || [[word:madotosh|madotosh]] || [[word:madoto|madoto]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:madotothol|madotothol]] || [[word:madotojol|madotojol]] || [[word:madotoshol|madotoshol]] || [[word:madotokol|madotokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:madotothotho|madotothotho]] || [[word:madotojojo|madotojojo]] || [[word:madotoshosho|madotoshosho]] || [[word:madotoko|madotoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:madotothon|madotothon]] || [[word:madotojon|madotojon]] || [[word:madotoshon|madotoshon]] || [[word:madotokon|madotokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:madotothoro|madotothoro]] || [[word:madotojoro|madotojoro]] || [[word:madotoshoro|madotoshoro]] || [[word:madotokoro|madotokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
